ddls:
CREATE TABLE "strain_collections" (
  "strain_collection_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each strain collection */,
  "strain_collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the strain collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strain collection */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the strain collection was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strain collection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the strain collection was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the strain collection */,
  "collection_type" TEXT /* Type of strain collection (e.g., yeast, bacteria) */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism of the strain collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strains" (
  "strain_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name of the strain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strain */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the strain */,
  "parent_strain_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent strain */,
  "parent_strain_type" TEXT /* Type of parent strain (e.g., wild-type, mutant) */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., deletion, insertion) */,
  "mutation_description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plates" (
  "plate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plate */,
  "plate_name" TEXT /* Name of the plate */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the plate (e.g., 384-well, 96-well) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plate */,
  "plate_type" TEXT /* Type of plate (e.g., PCR, sequencing) */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the plate */,
  "lot_number" TEXT /* Lot number of the plate */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the plate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plate_wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "plate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plate the well belongs to */,
  "row" INTEGER /* Row number of the well */,
  "column" INTEGER /* Column number of the well */,
  "strain_id" TEXT /* ID of the strain in the well */,
  "control" INTEGER /* Whether the well is a control well */,
  "well_volume" REAL /* Volume of the well in microliters */,
  "well_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the well in nanograms per microliter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plate_wells_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plate_wells_plate_id FOREIGN KEY ("plate_id") REFERENCES plates ("plate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date_started" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date the experiment completed */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., RNAi, CRISPR) */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_strain_collections" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "strain_collection_id" TEXT /* ID of the strain collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "strain_collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "lab" TEXT /* Lab the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "strain_collection_id" TEXT /* ID of the strain collection accessed */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access (e.g., lab, office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_strain_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_collection_id") REFERENCES strain_collections ("strain_collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_data" (
  "genomics_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomics data point */,
  "strain_id" TEXT /* ID of the strain the data belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of genomics data (e.g., sequencing, expression) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the genomics data */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the genomics data (e.g., reads, TPM) */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the genomics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomics_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomics_data_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strain_collection_notes" (
  "strain_collection_note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain collection note */,
  "strain_collection_id" TEXT /* ID of the strain collection the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_collection_note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strain_collection_notes_strain_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_collection_id") REFERENCES strain_collections ("strain_collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exclusions" (
  "exclusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exclusion */,
  "strain_id" TEXT /* ID of the strain the exclusion belongs to */,
  "exclusion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the exclusion */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the exclusion was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the exclusion */,
  "exclusion_type" TEXT /* Type of exclusion (e.g., contamination, poor quality) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exclusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exclusions_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE " experimental_designs" (
  "experimental_design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental design */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the design belongs to */,
  "design_type" TEXT /* Type of experimental design (e.g., RNAi, CRISPR) */,
  "design_description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experimental_design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the publication belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "external_data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "strain_collection_id" TEXT /* ID of the strain collection the data source belongs to */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_sources_strain_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_collection_id") REFERENCES strain_collections ("strain_collection_id")
)
